<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Iyono Shrine
| native_name = 伊予神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Iyono Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Iyono Shrine'''|伊予神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q9610964|ltq=Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Iyo Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Iyo Province|ja|伊予国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11378813|1=List of Shikinaisha in Iyo Province}}
** Series ordinal: 21
** P155: {{ill|Q3155126|ltq=Q3155126|qid=Q3155126|1=Isaniwa Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Isonono Shrine|lt=Isonono Shrine|qid=Q135041435|1=Isonono Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q907829|ltq=Q907829|qid=Q907829|1=Iyo Province}}
* {{ill|Q1206427|ltq=Q1206427|qid=Q1206427|1=Iyo District, Ehime}}
